title: On December 2, Zeng Shengwen, chairman of Tianhui Group, was invited to visit Jiutai Group for business inspection and exchange.
contentHtml:
On December 2, at the invitation of Jiutai Group, Chairman Zeng Shengwen and his party went to Inner Mongolia Jiutai New Materials Sales Co., Ltd.JiutaijiMr. Kan, the vice president of the group, Mr. Wang of the sales company and other leaders warmly received him.

The two parties exchanged views on Jiutai polyolefin product sales and user quality feedback, and discussed the direction of cooperation in 2020. Both parties stated that based on the principle of mutual benefit and win-win, they will continue to strengthen communication, deepen cooperation, and better serve downstream users.Strengthen the advantages of both parties, strengthen communication mechanisms, and make common progress in the industry.
titleZh: 12月2日天晖集团董事长曾胜文受邀到访久泰集团进行业务考察交流
contentHtmlZh:
12月2日应久泰集团邀请，董事长曾胜文一行前往内蒙古久泰新材料销售有限公司，久泰集团副总裁阚总，销售公司王总等领导热情接待。

双方交流了久泰聚烯烃产品销售及用户质量反馈情况，并就2020年的合作方向进行了探讨。双方表示，本着互利共赢的原则，将继续加强沟通，深化合作，更好地服务下游用户。强化双方优势，强化交流沟通机制，在行业领域共同进步。
